# `setLo`

**Systems:** MOS6502  
**Parameters:** `a, a`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<p>Sets the low bit of the address in parameter 0.
<p>For now, arrays/pointers must be of type byte
<p><strong>Examples:</strong></p>
<p><code>setlo(myInteger, $33); // sets the low bit in myInteger to $33
<p><code>setlo(myPointer, b); // sets the low bit in myPointer to value in variable b
</code>


</div>
